# Changelog

**Auto-generated** from git history. Run `bash scripts/generate-changelog.sh` to update.

### 2026-03-16

- ⚑ `74afec8` fix: escape Ukrainian apostrophe in Radio Svoboda JS string

- 🖼 `de755ad` assets: add city-builder placeholders + archaeology STL variants

- 🖼 `4ce781a` assets: download 14 more culture images from Wikimedia Commons

- 📄 `c15d3c7` docs: add timeline-engine.js to CLAUDE.md, update dev guides with new assets

- 📄 `7650d2f` docs: add Period 9 and new games to guides + CLAUDE.md

- ✦ `7932847` feat: add Diplomat text adventure (Period 3, 8-node branching story)

- ✦ `aae27e4` feat: add Culture Gallery quiz (Period 9, artwork identification carousel)

- ✦ `b5e1a11` feat: add Radio Svoboda quiz-show game (Period 7, broadcaster format)

- ✦ `2ec43c5` feat: add new game links to index.html + collapsible Period 9 section

- ✦ `1096826` feat: add Soviet timeline wrapper with socialist realism CSS styling

- ✦ `f99100e` feat: add City Builder game (Period 3, grid with VKL questions)

- ✦ `ac2eee2` feat: add Samvydav stealth game (Period 7, turn-based dissident literature)

- ✦ `bce2a4b` feat: add Archaeology excavation game (Period 1, canvas grid with dual controls)

- 🖼 `d75d90e` assets: download culture gallery + timeline images from Wikimedia Commons

- 🖼 `b4d898d` assets: download 9 archaeology images from Wikimedia Commons

- ✦ `62af66f` feat: add Culture Tower game (Period 9, 15-level stacking quiz)

- ✦ `17080a9` feat: create asset directories with README placeholders for user-provided images

- ✦ `7649b80` feat: add foundation files for game expansion (asset validator + 4 timelines + 2 falling quizzes)

- `480df22` Add game expansion implementation plan (17 tasks, 5 chunks)

- `f6a3b03` Fix archaeology controls: both drag-and-drop AND buttons

- `9e56e0b` Update game expansion spec with user feedback

- `3c16baf` Add game expansion spec: periods 1, 3, 7 + new period 9

- 📦 `dbf58e5` Add files via upload
